message:
feat(workflows): device auth step for usage-limit failover (wa-nu4.1.3.6)

Add Playwright-based device auth as a workflow step for the Codex
usage-limit failover pipeline:

- DeviceAuthStepOutcome enum: Authenticated | BootstrapRequired | Failed
- execute_device_auth_step(): validates code format, initializes
  BrowserContext, runs OpenAiDeviceAuthFlow, maps results
- device_auth_outcome_to_step_result(): maps outcomes to StepResult
  (Done for success, Abort for bootstrap/failure)
- Feature-gated behind cfg(feature = "browser")
- Device codes never logged (security)
- 14 new tests covering serde, code validation, browser init fallback,
  and StepResult mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
